case_title: DAVID P. WASSERMAN VS. LEE ROY LISKEY,DR.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL (OF RE-NOTICE OF HEARING TO CONFIRM ATTY-CLIENT FEE ARBITRATION AWARD AFTER ARBITRATION) FILED BY PETITIONER WASSERMAN, DAVID P.

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER DAVID WASSERMAN'S NOTICE OF HEARING TO CONFIRM ATTORNEY-CLIENT FEE ARBITRATION AWARD AFTER ARBITRATION IS CONTINUED TO 08/15/05 PER RE-NOTICE ON 07/12/05. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN CSR#8189

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WASSERMAN, DAVID P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LISKEY,DR., LEE ROY $30,427.69 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $30,427.69, WITH INTEREST TO ACCRUE ON THIS INDEBTEDNESS AT THE RATE OF 10% PER ANNUM UNTIL SAID JUDGMENT IS PAID IN FULL. SEE SCANNED DOC.
RE-NOTICE OF HEARING TO CONFIRM ATTY-CLIENT FEE ARBITRATION AWARD AFTER ARBITRATION FILED BY PETITIONER WASSERMAN, DAVID P. HEARING SET FOR AUG-15-2005 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-02-2005 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR #1558. (301/JLW)
